patterns.message: Close to warming concern: Freezing level rising to 1988m (threshold 2000m).
Upslope event Day 4: S/SE wind at 129°, humidity 75%, temp -2°C. Enhanced orographic snowfall likely.
Warning: Freezing level rising (1921 → 1988 → 2070m). Rain risk at freeride elevations.
Close to cold snap Day 9: 5°C drop to -4°C (needs >5°C drop below -5°C).

safety_flags: 2026-03-04: Freezing level above freeride zone (2321m). Rain risk at summit.
